name: Intel Core i7 14700 14th Gen Processor
description: Intel Core i7 14700 14th Gen Processor What is Intel Core i7 14700 14th Gen Processor price in Pakistan? Intel Core i7 14700 14th Gen Processor price in Pakistan is Rs.103,000. This powerful CPU offers 20 cores (8 Performance + 12 Efficient) and 28 threads with boost clocks up to 5.4 GHz, delivering strong performance for gaming, content creation, and multitasking. Compatible with LGA 1700 motherboards, it supports both DDR4 and DDR5 memory along with PCIe 5.0 for next-gen GPUs and fast storage.
